post.text: Exam ke pehle raat ko sab topper ban jaate hain. Subah wahi 'bhai 2 ghante soye hain' wali story. 😂
I think I like someone from CSE-B. We've never spoken properly but every time they explain something in class, I forget what I came to college for. ❤️
Sir asked 'any doubts?' and when someone actually asked a doubt, he said 'you should have studied this at home.' WHY DID YOU ASK THEN?! 😤
Discovered that writing notes in different colored pens doesn't make me study better — it just makes me feel like I did something productive for 3 hours. 📚
Our college WiFi is so slow, I submitted my assignment yesterday and it will probably reach the portal next semester. 🐌
We studied together for internals for two weeks. On result day, she texted 'thank you study buddy!' I got 18/30. She got 29/30. I think she's the one. 💀❤️
The campus cat knows everyone's name. She meows at the canteen uncle at 1pm sharp every day. She has a better schedule than me and honestly more discipline. 🐱
Group project: I did the report, the presentation, the code, and the research. They showed up on presentation day and said 'we' the whole time. THERE IS NO WE. 😤
I've read the same paragraph 11 times. I understood it the first time. I just keep reading it hoping something will change. It won't. I need help. 📖
Attendance is 73%. Minimum required: 75%. Number of days left: 4. Number of holidays upcoming: 2. I'm doing the mathematics of survival, not integration. 📉
They once said 'you're pretty smart' in a group chat meant for someone else. I screenshot it. It's my lockscreen. That was 8 months ago. I'm fine. ❤️
To whoever returns library books on time: you are the unsung hero of this institution. The rest of you — we see you. The fine counter sees you too. 👀
